sentences.text: The novel that I borrowed from the library was written over a hundred years ago.
sentences.translation_zh: 我从图书馆借的那本小说是一百多年前写的。
sentences.translation_vi: Cuon tieu thuyet ma toi muon tu thu vien duoc viet cach day hon mot tram nam.

sentences.text: She told me that she had finished reading the biography in just two days.
sentences.translation_zh: 她告诉我她只用了两天就读完了那本传记。
sentences.translation_vi: Co ay noi voi toi rang co ay da doc xong cuon tieu su chi trong hai ngay.

sentences.text: The author whose books have been translated into thirty languages lives in London.
sentences.translation_zh: 那位作品被翻译成三十种语言的作者住在伦敦。
sentences.translation_vi: Tac gia co sach duoc dich sang ba muoi ngon ngu song tai Luan Don.

sentences.text: It is widely believed that reading fiction develops empathy in children.
sentences.translation_zh: 人们普遍认为阅读小说能培养儿童的同理心。
sentences.translation_vi: Nguoi ta tin rong rai rang doc truyen hu cau giup phat trien su dong cam o tre em.

constituents.label_vi: chu ngu menh de danh tu

sentences.text: I usually read before bed because it helps me fall asleep more quickly.
sentences.translation_zh: 我通常在睡觉前阅读，因为这能帮助我更快入睡。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi thuong doc sach truoc khi ngu vi no giup toi ngu nhanh hon.

sentences.text: The bookstore where I spent my childhood has been closed permanently.
sentences.translation_zh: 我度过童年的那家书店已经永久关闭了。
sentences.translation_vi: Hieu sach noi toi da trai qua thoi tho au da dong cua vinh vien.

constituents.label_vi: vi ngu bi dong + trang ngu

sentences.text: The poem which won the literary prize was recited by a young student.
sentences.translation_zh: 获得文学奖的那首诗是由一位年轻学生朗诵的。
sentences.translation_vi: Bai tho gianh giai thuong van hoc duoc doc boi mot hoc sinh tre.

sentences.text: He explained that the story was based on events that actually happened.
sentences.translation_zh: 他解释说这个故事是基于真实发生的事件。
sentences.translation_vi: Anh ay giai thich rang cau chuyen dua tren nhung su kien thuc su da xay ra.

sentences.text: Although e-books are convenient, many readers still prefer the feel of paper.
sentences.translation_zh: 虽然电子书很方便，但许多读者仍然喜欢纸张的手感。
sentences.translation_vi: Mac du sach dien tu tien loi, nhieu doc gia van thich cam giac cua giay.

sentences.text: The chapter that describes the protagonist's journey is the most interesting part.
sentences.translation_zh: 描述主人公旅程的那一章是最有趣的部分。
sentences.translation_vi: Chuong mo ta hanh trinh cua nhan vat chinh la phan thu vi nhat.

sentences.text: More libraries should be built so that everyone has access to free books.
sentences.translation_zh: 应该建造更多的图书馆，以便每个人都能免费获取书籍。
sentences.translation_vi: Nen xay dung them nhieu thu vien de moi nguoi deu co the tiep can sach mien phi.

sentences.text: The mystery novel kept me so engaged that I forgot to eat dinner.
sentences.translation_zh: 那本悬疑小说让我如此投入，以至于我忘了吃晚饭。
sentences.translation_vi: Cuon tieu thuyet bi an hap dan toi den muc toi quen an toi.

sentences.text: Reading is considered one of the best ways to expand your vocabulary.
sentences.translation_zh: 阅读被认为是扩大词汇量的最佳方式之一。
sentences.translation_vi: Doc sach duoc coi la mot trong nhung cach tot nhat de mo rong von tu vung.

constituents.label_vi: vi ngu bi dong + bo ngu

sentences.text: She asked me which genre I preferred and I said that I enjoyed science fiction.
sentences.translation_zh: 她问我喜欢哪种类型，我说我喜欢科幻小说。
sentences.translation_vi: Co ay hoi toi thich the loai nao va toi noi rang toi thich khoa hoc vien tuong.

sentences.text: The book club that was started by our teacher meets every Wednesday evening.
sentences.translation_zh: 由我们老师创办的读书俱乐部每周三晚上聚会。
sentences.translation_vi: Cau lac bo sach duoc giao vien cua chung toi thanh lap hop moi toi thu Tu.

constituents.label_vi: vi ngu + trang ngu thoi gian
